invalid_reason: do_recall clamped to 100 in-library on v2.4.38..v2.4.40, while the harness convention is full ranking (limit=corpus_size). Any answer past rank 100 was scored as a miss, so large-corpus tasks are under-measured. Fixed in 2.5.0.
latency_note: run with --fast acceleration; latency numbers are not representative of as-shipped recall
